Spring Data for Apache Cassandra Core
  1. org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
  2. Query

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query.Query

Packages that use Query
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for Apache Cassandra specific repositories.

    ExecutableDeleteOperation.DeleteWithQuery.matching(Query query)
    Define the Query filtering elements to delete.

    ExecutableSelectOperation.SelectWithQuery.matching(Query query)
    Set the Query used as a filter in the SELECT statement.

    ExecutableUpdateOperation.UpdateWithQuery.matching(Query query)

    ReactiveDeleteOperation.TerminatingDelete
    ReactiveDeleteOperation.DeleteWithQuery.matching(Query query)

    Set the Query used as a filter in the SELECT statement.

    ReactiveUpdateOperation.UpdateWithQuery.matching(Query query)
    Filter rows to update by the given Query.

    Execute a SELECT query and convert the resulting items to a List of entities.

    Create a Query initialized with a PageRequest to fetch the first page of results or advance in paging along with sorting.

    Set the paging state to skip rows.
